steps.title: Simplify the first equation
steps.content:
Move the $y$ terms together in the first equation:
$$\frac{9}{10}y-\frac{7}{10}x=\frac{4}{7}-\frac{9}{10}y$$
$$\frac{18}{10}y-\frac{7}{10}x=\frac{4}{7}$$
Multiplying by $-10$ gives
$$7x-18y=-\frac{40}{7}$$

steps.title: Simplify the second equation
steps.content:
Start with the second equation:
$$\frac{7}{4}x+\frac{5}{4}=py+\frac{17}{4}$$
Move terms and multiply by $4$:
$$7x-4py=12$$

steps.title: Match the coefficients
steps.content:
For no solution, the lines must be parallel and distinct. The $x$-coefficients already match, so match the $y$-coefficients:
$$-18=-4p$$
$$p=4.5$$
The constants are different, so the lines are distinct.
The answer is 4.5.
